title: The Goose That Laid the Golden Eggs
content:
Once a farmer and his wife had a very special goose. Every morning, the goose laid one beautiful golden egg. The farmer would sell the egg at the market, and they always had plenty of money to live comfortably.

Day after day, the goose laid one golden egg. The farmer and his wife were happy and well-fed. But soon they grew greedy. One golden egg a day no longer felt like enough.

The farmer said, "If the goose lays golden eggs, she must be full of gold inside! Let us cut her open and get all the gold at once!" His wife agreed, and so they did.

But when they opened the goose, they found nothing special inside. She was just like any other goose. The golden eggs were gone forever. The farmer and his wife had lost their greatest treasure through their own greed. Be careful not to wish for too much.

author: Aesop
